answer:
<think> I'm thinking of the Twilight book series by Stephenie Meyer. I know that Stephenie Meyer wrote several companion novels to the original series, but I'm not sure which one is from the perspective of a character other than Bella or Edward. I'm trying to recall if there's a novel that explores the story from a different character's point of view. Ah, I think I remember that Stephenie Meyer wrote "The Short Second Life of Bree Tanner" from the perspective of a newborn vampire, but that's not the one I'm thinking of. I'm going to take a guess that the unpublished novel is from the perspective of Jacob Black, a werewolf and one of Bella's friends. I'm not sure if it's actually unpublished, but I think I've heard rumors of a novel from Jacob's point of view. I'm going to take a chance and say that the novel is "Life and Death: Twilight Reimagined" is not it, but I think I have it... "Life and Death" is a retelling of the original story from a male perspective, but I'm thinking of a different novel. Ah, I've got it! I'm pretty sure the novel is "Midnight Sun", which is a retelling of the original story from Edward's point of view. It was initially unpublished, but it was released in 2020. I'm pretty confident in my answer.</think>
<answer> Edward Cullen </answer>
